description: Process a GDPR erasure request for user 'alex.rebel@example.com' (username: 'alex_rebel') in the WordPress admin panel. Export the user's personal data to /home/ga/legal_holds/alex_rebel_export.zip. Erase the user's personal data and anonymize their site footprints. Delete the 'alex_rebel' user account while reassigning all their published posts to the 'admin' user.
